title: Athletic Locker Room Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Athletic Locker Room Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 photoreal athletic locker-room portrait for adult runner in layered athletic tank and high-waisted training shorts, calm focused expression, built around a controlled shush gesture and clean sports-fashion realism without visible text. Subject: adult runner in layered athletic tank and high-waisted training shorts, calm focused expression is the adult athletic fashion subject, with clear hair, makeup, accessories, outfit structure, and a sharp over-shoulder look kept tasteful and non-explicit. Scene: modern gym locker room with soft fluorescent light and candid phone-photo feel anchors the portrait in a realistic locker-room stall with tile, partition hardware, earbuds, jewelry, and small fashion details. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 locker-stall composition: body angled away from camera, face looking back over one shoulder, one finger raised near the lips in a shush gesture, the other hand placed on the tile wall, tight crop with beige tile on one side and dark stall partition on the other. Signature Elements: High ponytail and cream headband, athletic crop silhouette, wireless earbud, small gold hoops, winged eyeliner, one-finger shush gesture, palm on tile wall, beige tile stripe, and visible stall hardware. Style: Ultra-realistic phone-camera sports-fashion portrait with editorial detail, natural skin texture, clean athletic styling, subtle tension, and believable locker-room atmosphere. Color Palette: Sage green, forest green, cream headband, beige ceramic tile, dark gray metal partition, muted lipstick tones, small gold jewelry highlights, and neutral fluorescent locker-room color. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Vertical close portrait with realistic perspective, sharp eye contact, detailed hands and nails, shallow but natural depth, and center-safe framing for mobile display. Materials: Ribbed athletic fabric, ceramic tile, dark painted metal stall partition, silver latch hardware, wireless earbud plastic, small gold hoops, and matte makeup texture. Restrictions: Use an adult subject only. Keep the pose public-safe and non-explicit.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
